items.reason: Path is a portable-looking configuration file.

findings.message: Review MCP server "docs" before syncing this config after package args changed.
findings.recommended_action: Confirm this server is intentional and pinned before syncing.
findings.impact: Unsafe portable config can expose secrets or local-only state.
findings.why_this_matters: Fixture reports keep docs examples stable.
findings.fix_summary: Confirm this server is intentional and pinned before syncing.
fix_steps: Re-run Nightward and compare the next report.

findings.message: MCP server "docs" stores sensitive env key API_KEY inline.
findings.recommended_action: Move the value to a local secret source and keep only the variable name in portable config.
findings.impact: Unsafe portable config can expose secrets or local-only state.
findings.why_this_matters: Fixture reports keep docs examples stable.
findings.fix_summary: Move the value to a local secret source.
fix_steps: Move the value to a local secret source.
